chunks.text: In April, a new school year began.
I moved up to a new junior class, and some of my classmates were new.
“ Today, let's learn many new words,” our teacher said with a smile.
I opened my notebook and put an eraser and a pencil on my desk.
During the lunch break, I went out to the schoolyard with my friends.
We ran a lot and laughed a lot.
Next month, we will have an exam.
Everyone wants to pass, so we practice a little at home every day.
“ I don't want to fail,” my sister said with energy.
My new textbook still smells of fresh ink.
Each time I turn a page
I feel that new words and stories are waiting for me.
Today, a senior student said to me in the hall
“ Your next grade will also be fun.
